title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF BALUD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SALCEDO, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, INTO A  BARRIO, TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF BALUD.

chunks.text:
H. No. 86 / 55 OG No. 35, 2860 (April 20, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2095, March 22, 1959 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF BALUD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SALCEDO, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, INTO A BARRIO, TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF BALUD.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Balud in the Municipality of Salcedo, Province of Samar, is converted into a barrio of said municipality, to be known as the barrio of Balud.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, March 22, 1959.
